generation.image_prompt: Mystical 1900s lithography tarot card illustration. Clean bold black ink outlines. 2:3 vertical. FULL BLEED: No borders, no text. ANTHROPOMORPHIC: A dignified Taiwan leopard cat king standing upright on two legs, wearing a royal purple robe with a thick collar. He sits on a throne shaped like a shell, holding a golden cup. Slender build (not a lion), sharp small-cat facial structure, white ear spots, forehead stripes. Stormy sea background. Full bleed. No borders.
generation.narrative: The King of Cups is the Balanced Master—the noble leopard cat that remains calm even when the world shifts around him.

meanings.upright: Happiness, emotional harmony, family, reunion, and a high sense of community.
meanings.reversed: Conflict in relationships, family disagreements, or a disconnection from a group.

ecology.zh: 成年雄性石虎展現出極強的領地掌控力。牠們能在大規模的環境變遷中，憑藉智慧與耐力守護族群邊界。
ecology.en: Mature male leopard cats exhibit strong territorial mastery, protecting their kin through large-scale ecosystem changes with wisdom and resilience.

website.excerpt: Under the double rainbow, the leopard cat family finds a home where all life flows in harmony.
website.seo_description: Ten of Cups reimagined as a thriving leopard cat family in a safe, vibrant ecosystem.

meaning.zh: 情感的平衡、自律、智者的慈悲、穩定的領導力。在大風大浪中依然保持內心的寧靜。
meaning.en: Emotional balance, self-control, wise compassion, and stable leadership. Calmness amidst the storms of the soul.
